verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I've waited so long praying for you A woman of virtue More precious than gold A perfect type of the bride That Jesus is coming for And here we're in the natural of the greatest love story

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: This is our love story That grace and mercy wrote We've come this far on the wings of love This is the season of jubilee For the bridegroom and the bride This's our love story That grace and mercy wrote

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Now that I'm called by your name Mrs. Jesus The name above all other names The name of power and strength And by this, we shall overcome No matter the storms For the Lord is on our side In this journey of love
